gloss_en: Today the weather is not good.
notes: Gascon F- aspiration hè<FACIT [ˈhɛ] and open-mid è [ɛ] per alibert1976; negator 'non' per bec1973.

gloss_en: These shoes cost forty euros.
notes: Aranese demonstrative 'aguesti' and open-mid ò/è [ɔ ɛ] per alibert1976; 'sabatons' [saβaˈtuns] with atonic o>[u] and s>voiced junction 'còsten quaranta' per bec1973.

sentence: Era amassada ei deman a tres ores.
ipa: ˈeɾa amaˈsaða ˈej deˈman ˈa ˈtres ˈuɾes
gloss_en: The meeting is tomorrow at three o'clock.
notes: Feminine article 'era' and 'amassada' (meeting) per alibert1976; trill [r] in 'ores' and vowel-junction sandhi 'era amassada' per ladefoged_maddieson1996.

sentence: Era mia familha viu en Vielha.
ipa: ˈeɾa ˈmia faˈmiʎa ˈbiw ˈen ˈbieʎa
gloss_en: My family lives in Vielha.
notes: Occitan digraph lh>[ʎ] in 'familha'/'Vielha' per alibert1976; 'viu' (lives) and elision junction 'viu en' per bec1973.

sentence: Va tot dret enquia era glèisa.
ipa: ˈba ˈtut ˈdret ˈenkia ˈeɾa ˈɡlɛisa
gloss_en: Go straight on to the church.
notes: Imperative 'va', 'tot dret' (straight on) and 'glèisa' with open-mid è [ɛ] per bec1973; trill in 'dret'/'glèisa' per ladefoged_maddieson1996.

gloss_en: This bread is very good.
notes: Aranese ç>[s] (no interdental) in 'fòrça' and open-mid ò [ɔ] per alibert1976; intensifier 'fòrça' (very) per bec1973.

gloss_en: Where is the market?
notes: Gascon masculine article 'eth' [et] per alibert1976; interrogative 'a on' and trill [r] in 'mercat' per bec1973.

gloss_en: How many apples do you want?
notes: Quantifier 'guaires' (how many) and open-mid ò [ɔ] in 'vòs' per bec1973; s-final voicing junction 'pomes vòs' per ladefoged_maddieson1996.

gloss_en: If it rains, we will stay at home.
notes: Conditional 'se plò' with open-mid ò [ɔ] and future 'demoraram' per alibert1976; 'ena' (in the) per bec1973.

gloss_en: Yesterday I bought bread and cheese.
notes: Preterite 'crompè' [kɾuˈmpɛ] and Gascon F->h 'hormatge' [huˈrmatɡe] per alibert1976; trill in 'hormatge' per ladefoged_maddieson1996.

gloss_en: Tomorrow we will travel to Lleida.
notes: Future 'aniram', directional 'tà', and initial lh>[ʎ] in the placename 'Lhèida' with open-mid è per alibert1976; toponym per bec1973.

gloss_en: Good day, how are you?
notes: Greeting pair and polite 2pl 'anatz' with word-final affricate [ts]; voiced [dʒ] in 'dia' per alibert1976; register per bec1973.

gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained.
notes: Proverb; geminate rr>trill [r] in 'arrisca' per ladefoged_maddieson1996; wording per bec1973.

gloss_en: The lady speaks Aranese.
notes: Digraph nh>[ɲ] in 'senhora' and 3sg 'parle' per alibert1976; trill in 'parle'/'aranés' and elision 'senhora parle'... covered by alibert1976.

gloss_en: My daughters are young.
notes: Plural article 'es', lh>[ʎ] in 'hilhes' (daughters, Gascon F->h) and voiced [dʒ] in 'joenes' per alibert1976; junction 'mies hilhes' per bec1973.

gloss_en: Eleven birds were singing in the tree.
notes: Numeral 'onze' with voiced [z], open-mid è in 'aucèths' and imperfect 'cantauen' per alibert1976; trill in 'arbe' per ladefoged_maddieson1996.

gloss_en: The mountain is snow-covered.
notes: Digraph nh>[ɲ] in 'montanha' and initial nh 'nheuada' per alibert1976; elision 'montanha ei' per bec1973.

sentence: Es jorns de junh son calorosi.
ipa: ˈes ˈdʒurns ˈde ˈdʒyɲ ˈsun kaluˈɾusi
gloss_en: The days of June are hot.
notes: Voiced [dʒ] in 'jorns'/'junh', nh>[ɲ] in 'junh', trill in 'jorns'/'calorosi' per alibert1976 and ladefoged_maddieson1996.

sentence: Era net ei bèra e cauda.
ipa: ˈeɾa ˈnet ˈej ˈbɛɾa ˈe ˈkawða
gloss_en: The night is beautiful and warm.
notes: Open-mid è [ɛ] in 'bèra' and 'net' (night) per alibert1976; elision junctions 'net ei'/'bèra e' per bec1973.

gloss_en: This water is cold.
notes: 'aiga' (water) and Gascon F->h 'hereda' (cold) per alibert1976; elision 'aiga ei' per bec1973; Aranese has no gheada, the onset [h] here is the F->h reflex per bec1973.
